name: PBMC Isolation by Density Gradient Centrifugation (Ficoll)
nameCn: 密度梯度离心法分离 PBMC（外周血单个核细胞）

components.name: 1. Collect blood into EDTA or heparin tube; process within 2 h at RT

note.en: EDTA: 1.8 mg/mL (purple-top Vacutainer). Heparin: 10–20 U/mL (green-top). Do NOT use SST (serum-separator) or clotted blood. Keep at RT (not on ice — cold causes platelet/lymphocyte aggregation).
note.zh: EDTA（紫色管）或肝素（绿色管）采血管。禁用 SST（血清分离管）或已凝固血液。室温保存（不可冰上——冷藏导致血小板/淋巴细胞聚集）。采血后 2 h 内处理。

components.name: 2. Dilute blood 1:1 with RT DPBS (without Ca²⁺/Mg²⁺)

note.en: Dilution reduces viscosity and improves separation. Use DPBS at RT (not cold). Gently invert to mix. 20 mL diluted blood is typical starting volume.
note.zh: 稀释降低黏度，改善分离效果。用室温 DPBS（不用冷的）。轻柔颠倒混匀。典型起始体积：20 mL 稀释血液。

components.name: 3. Add Ficoll-Paque (1.077 g/mL) to conical tube: 10 mL Ficoll per 20 mL diluted blood

note.en: Warm Ficoll-Paque to RT (critical — cold Ficoll gives poor separation). For SepMate tubes (Stem Cell Tech): add Ficoll first, then pour blood on top — faster and cleaner. Use 15 mL Ficoll for 50 mL tube; 3 mL for 15 mL tube.
note.zh: Ficoll-Paque 必须恢复至室温（关键——冷的会导致分离失败）。SepMate 管（Stem Cell Tech）：先加 Ficoll 再倒血液——更快更干净。50 mL 管用 15 mL Ficoll；15 mL 管用 3 mL。

components.name: 4. Layer diluted blood slowly over Ficoll (do not mix layers)

note.en: Tilt tube 45°; pipette diluted blood down the tube wall so it floats gently on top of Ficoll. Two distinct layers must be visible. Alternatively, underlay Ficoll under blood using a long needle.
note.zh: 将管倾斜 45°，沿管壁缓慢加入稀释血液，使其轻轻漂浮在 Ficoll 上方。必须可见明显两层界面。也可用长针在血液下方注入 Ficoll（倒置法）。

components.name: 5. Centrifuge: 400×g, 30–35 min, RT (no brake, no acceleration ramp)

note.en: CRITICAL: acceleration = 9 (slow), brake = 0 (NO BRAKE). Deceleration with brake disrupts the density interface. RT (18–25°C). Most centrifuges: set to slowest decel (0 or 1).
note.zh: 关键：加速度 = 9（慢速），刹车 = 0（无刹车）。刹车会扰乱密度界面。室温（18–25°C）。大多数离心机：设置最慢减速（0 或 1）。

note.en: Top: plasma + platelets. Buffy coat (white ring at Ficoll interface): PBMCs. Ficoll layer: granulocytes settling. Pellet (red): erythrocytes + granulocytes. PBMC band may be thin — collect carefully.
note.zh: 顶层：血浆 + 血小板。白膜层（Ficoll 界面白色环）：PBMC。Ficoll 层：粒细胞。红色沉淀：红细胞 + 粒细胞。PBMC 带可能较薄——小心收集。

components.name: 7. Collect buffy coat (PBMC layer): insert pipette just above Ficoll interface; aspirate 2–4 mL

note.en: Collect in a clean 15 or 50 mL tube. Taking ≤1 mL of Ficoll is acceptable. Avoid disturbing lower layers.
note.zh: 收集到干净的 15 或 50 mL 管中。带入少量（≤1 mL）Ficoll 可接受。避免扰动下层。

components.name: 8. Wash 1: add 40 mL RT DPBS; 300×g 10 min RT (WITH brake); decant supernatant

note.en: This wash removes residual Ficoll and platelets. Pellet should be white/cream (PBMCs). If red → erythrocyte contamination → add 2 mL ACK lysis buffer (150 mM NH₄Cl, 10 mM KHCO₃, 0.1 mM EDTA, pH 7.2), 5 min RT.
note.zh: 此步去除残余 Ficoll 和血小板。沉淀应为白色/奶油色（PBMC）。如偏红 → 红细胞污染 → 加 2 mL ACK 裂解液（150 mM NH₄Cl、10 mM KHCO₃、0.1 mM EDTA，pH 7.2），RT 5 min。

components.name: 9. Wash 2: resuspend in 10 mL DPBS; 200×g 10 min RT; decant

note.en: Second wash at lower g-force to remove most remaining platelets (platelets sediment at higher g, are discarded with supernatant).
note.zh: 第二次洗涤用较低离心力去除残余血小板（血小板在较高 g 时沉淀，随上清丢弃）。

components.name: 10. Resuspend in RPMI-1640 + 10% FBS or DPBS; count and assess viability

note.en: cell_counting_hemocytometer with trypan blue. Typical yield: 1–2×10⁶ PBMCs/mL blood. Viability should be >90%. PBMC composition: ~80% lymphocytes (T, B, NK), ~15% monocytes, ~5% dendritic cells.
note.zh: cell_counting_hemocytometer 台盼蓝计数。典型产量：每毫升血液 1–2×10⁶ PBMC。活率应 >90%。PBMC 组成：约 80% 淋巴细胞（T、B、NK）、约 15% 单核细胞、约 5% 树突状细胞。

detailedSteps.en: **Blood collection & preparation**
detailedSteps.zh: **血液采集与准备**

detailedSteps.en: Collect blood into EDTA (purple-top, 1.8 mg/mL) or heparin (green-top, 10–20 U/mL) Vacutainer tubes. Do NOT use serum separator tubes or clotted blood. Keep at RT (18–25°C). Process within 2 h of collection.
detailedSteps.zh: EDTA（紫色管，1.8 mg/mL）或肝素（绿色管，10–20 U/mL）采血管采集血液。禁用血清分离管或凝固血液。室温（18–25°C）保存。采血后 2 h 内处理。

detailedSteps.en: Dilute blood 1:1 with RT DPBS (without Ca²⁺/Mg²⁺). Gently mix by inverting 5–10 times. For example, 10 mL blood + 10 mL DPBS.
detailedSteps.zh: 室温 DPBS（无 Ca²⁺/Mg²⁺）1:1 稀释血液。轻柔颠倒混匀 5–10 次。例如，10 mL 血液 + 10 mL DPBS。

detailedSteps.en: Warm Ficoll-Paque Plus (1.077 g/mL) to RT (≥30 min). This is critical — cold Ficoll causes poor separation.
detailedSteps.zh: Ficoll-Paque Plus（1.077 g/mL）恢复室温（≥30 min）。这很关键——冷的 Ficoll 会导致分离失败。

detailedSteps.en: **Gradient setup & centrifugation**
detailedSteps.zh: **梯度建立与离心**

detailedSteps.en: Add Ficoll-Paque to 50 mL conical tube: 15 mL for 30 mL diluted blood (or 10 mL per 20 mL diluted blood). For SepMate tubes: add Ficoll first, then pour diluted blood through the insert port.
detailedSteps.zh: 50 mL 离心管中加 Ficoll-Paque：30 mL 稀释血液用 15 mL（或每 20 mL 稀释血液加 10 mL）。SepMate 管：先加 Ficoll，再通过插入口倒入稀释血液。

detailedSteps.en: Slowly layer diluted blood over Ficoll: tilt tube 45°, pipette blood down the tube wall so it floats gently on top. Do NOT mix. Two distinct layers must be visible.
detailedSteps.zh: 缓慢将稀释血液层叠在 Ficoll 上：管倾斜 45°，沿管壁缓慢加入血液使其轻轻漂浮在上方。不可混合。必须可见两个明显分层。

detailedSteps.en: Centrifuge at 400×g for 30–35 min at RT (18–25°C). CRITICAL settings: brake = 0 (no brake), acceleration = lowest setting (slow ramp). Deceleration must be slow to preserve the gradient.
detailedSteps.zh: 400×g 离心 30–35 min，室温（18–25°C）。关键设置：刹车 = 0（无刹车），加速度 = 最低档（慢速）。减速必须缓慢以保持梯度。

detailedSteps.en: **PBMC collection**
detailedSteps.zh: **PBMC 收集**

detailedSteps.en: After centrifugation, identify layers: plasma/platelets (top, yellow), PBMC buffy coat (thin white ring at Ficoll interface), Ficoll (transparent), granulocytes (below Ficoll), RBC pellet (bottom, red). Carefully remove supernatant without disturbing the buffy coat.
detailedSteps.zh: 离心后识别各层：血浆/血小板（顶层，黄色）、PBMC 白膜层（Ficoll 界面的薄白色环）、Ficoll（透明）、粒细胞（Ficoll 下方）、红细胞沉淀（底部，红色）。小心去除上清，勿扰动白膜层。

detailedSteps.en: Collect the PBMC buffy coat with a pipette: insert tip just above the Ficoll interface, aspirate 2–4 mL containing the white ring. Transfer to a clean 15 or 50 mL tube. Taking ≤1 mL of Ficoll is acceptable.
detailedSteps.zh: 移液器收集 PBMC 白膜层：吸头插入 Ficoll 界面略上方，吸取 2–4 mL（含白色环）。转移到干净的 15 或 50 mL 管。带入少量（≤1 mL）Ficoll 可接受。

detailedSteps.en: **Washing**
Wash 1: Add 30–40 mL RT DPBS to collected PBMCs. Centrifuge 300×g, 10 min, RT (WITH brake). Decant supernatant.
detailedSteps.zh: 洗涤 1：收集的 PBMC 加 30–40 mL 室温 DPBS。300×g 离心 10 min，RT（带刹车）。倾去上清。

detailedSteps.en: If pellet is red (RBC contamination): resuspend in 2 mL ACK lysis buffer, incubate 5 min RT. Add 10 mL DPBS to stop lysis. Centrifuge 300×g 5 min RT.
detailedSteps.zh: 如沉淀偏红（红细胞污染）：重悬于 2 mL ACK 裂解液，RT 孵育 5 min。加 10 mL DPBS 终止裂解。300×g 离心 5 min RT。

detailedSteps.en: Wash 2: Resuspend pellet in 10 mL RT DPBS. Centrifuge 200×g, 10 min, RT (with brake). This lower-speed wash removes most residual platelets.
detailedSteps.zh: 洗涤 2：沉淀重悬于 10 mL 室温 DPBS。200×g 离心 10 min，RT（带刹车）。此次低速洗涤去除残余血小板。

detailedSteps.en: Resuspend final pellet in RPMI-1640 + 10% FBS or appropriate buffer. Count cells with hemocytometer using trypan blue. Typical yield: 1–2×10⁶ PBMCs/mL blood. Viability should be >90%.
detailedSteps.zh: 最终沉淀重悬于 RPMI-1640 + 10% FBS 或适当缓冲液。台盼蓝血球计数室计数。典型产量：每毫升血液 1–2×10⁶ PBMC。活率应 >90%。

briefSteps.en: Collect blood RT → Dilute 1:1 with RT DPBS → Layer over RT Ficoll (1.077 g/mL) → 400×g 30–35 min RT, NO BRAKE → Collect buffy coat → Wash 300×g 10 min → (Optional: ACK lysis) → Wash 200×g 10 min → Count & resuspend
briefSteps.zh: 室温采血 → 1:1 RT DPBS 稀释 → 层叠于室温 Ficoll（1.077 g/mL）→ 400×g 30–35 min RT，无刹车 → 收集白膜层 → 300×g 10 min 洗涤 →（可选：ACK 裂解）→ 200×g 10 min 洗涤 → 计数重悬

note.en: Isolated PBMCs can be cryopreserved in 90% FBS + 10% DMSO at 10–20×10⁶ cells/mL in liquid nitrogen indefinitely
note.zh: 分离的 PBMC 可冻存于 90% FBS + 10% DMSO，10–20×10⁶ 细胞/mL，液氮中无限期保存

note.en: Fresh PBMCs should be used immediately or within 2 h for best viability; they can be held in RPMI + 10% FBS at RT for up to 4 h
note.zh: 新鲜 PBMC 应立即使用或 2 h 内处理以获得最佳活率；可在 RPMI + 10% FBS 中室温保存最多 4 h

notes.en: Critical success factors: (1) Fresh blood at RT throughout; (2) Ficoll at RT; (3) NO BRAKE on centrifuge deceleration; (4) Careful harvesting of buffy coat. For cryopreservation: resuspend at 10–20×10⁶ cells/mL in 90% FBS + 10% DMSO (cell_freezing); rapid cooling in Mr. Frosty to −80°C; transfer to liquid N₂. For immediate downstream: proceed to magnetic bead depletion (MACS), activation, or flow staining (flow_panel_staining).
notes.zh: 成功关键因素：(1) 全程血液保持室温；(2) Ficoll 恢复至室温；(3) 离心减速无刹车；(4) 小心收集白膜层。冻存：10–20×10⁶ cells/mL 重悬于 90% FBS + 10% DMSO（cell_freezing），Mr. Frosty 缓慢降温至 −80°C，后转液氮。下游实验：磁珠分选（MACS）、细胞激活或流式染色（flow_panel_staining）。

ref: Boyum (1968) Scand J Clin Lab Invest Suppl 97:77–89; Ulmer et al. (1984) Immunobiology 166:238–250; Kleiveland (2015) Handbook of Cell Biology; STEMCELL Technologies EasySep Manual

materials.name: Whole blood (anticoagulated with EDTA or heparin)

usage.en: Isolate peripheral blood mononuclear cells (PBMCs) from whole blood by Ficoll density gradient centrifugation.
usage.zh: Ficoll 密度梯度离心从全血中分离外周血单个核细胞（PBMC）。

label.en: Use freshly isolated PBMCs or cryopreserve immediately
label.zh: 使用新鲜分离的 PBMC 或立即冻存

note.en: After centrifugation, layers are stable for 15–30 min at RT. Do not delay harvesting beyond 30 min.
note.zh: 离心后，分层可在室温下稳定 15–30 分钟。不要延迟超过 30 分钟再收集。

note.en: Washed PBMCs can be cryopreserved in 90% FBS + 10% DMSO and stored in liquid N₂ indefinitely.
note.zh: 洗涤后的 PBMC 可用 90% FBS + 10% DMSO 冻存于液氮中，可长期保存。

briefSteps.en: Collect blood → dilute 1:1 with DPBS → layer over Ficoll → centrifuge 400×g 30 min (no brake) → harvest buffy coat → wash 2× → resuspend & count
briefSteps.zh: 采血 → 1:1 DPBS 稀释 → 铺于 Ficoll 上 → 400×g 离心 30 min（无刹车）→ 收集白膜层 → 洗涤 2 次 → 重悬计数

detailedSteps.en: **Blood Collection & Preparation**
detailedSteps.zh: **采血与准备**

detailedSteps.en: Collect whole blood into EDTA (purple-top) or heparin (green-top) tube. Keep at room temperature and process within 2 hours.
detailedSteps.zh: 将全血采集到 EDTA（紫色管）或肝素（绿色管）采血管中。室温保存，2 小时内处理。

detailedSteps.en: Dilute blood 1:1 with room-temperature DPBS (without Ca²⁺/Mg²⁺). Gently invert to mix.
detailedSteps.zh: 用室温 DPBS（不含 Ca²⁺/Mg²⁺）将血液 1:1 稀释。轻柔颠倒混匀。

detailedSteps.en: **Ficoll Density Gradient Setup**
detailedSteps.zh: **Ficoll 密度梯度铺层**

detailedSteps.en: Add room-temperature Ficoll-Paque (1.077 g/mL) to a conical tube: 10 mL Ficoll per 20 mL diluted blood.
detailedSteps.zh: 向离心管中加入室温 Ficoll-Paque（1.077 g/mL）：每 20 mL 稀释血液加 10 mL Ficoll。

detailedSteps.en: Tilt tube 45° and slowly layer diluted blood over Ficoll along the tube wall. Two distinct layers must be visible — do not mix.
detailedSteps.zh: 将管倾斜 45°，沿管壁缓慢将稀释血液铺在 Ficoll 上方。必须可见两层清晰界面——不可混合。

detailedSteps.en: **Density Gradient Centrifugation**
detailedSteps.zh: **密度梯度离心**

detailedSteps.en: Centrifuge at 400×g for 30–35 min at RT. CRITICAL: set acceleration to slow (9), brake OFF (0). Braking disrupts the density interface.
detailedSteps.zh: 室温 400×g 离心 30–35 分钟。关键：加速度设为慢速（9），刹车关闭（0）。刹车会破坏密度界面。

detailedSteps.en: Identify layers: top = plasma/platelets; white ring at Ficoll interface = PBMCs (buffy coat); red pellet = erythrocytes/granulocytes.
detailedSteps.zh: 辨认各层：顶层 = 血浆/血小板；Ficoll 界面白色环 = PBMC（白膜层）；红色沉淀 = 红细胞/粒细胞。

detailedSteps.en: **PBMC Harvesting**
detailedSteps.zh: **PBMC 收集**

detailedSteps.en: Carefully insert pipette just above the Ficoll interface and aspirate the buffy coat (2–4 mL) into a clean conical tube. Avoid disturbing lower layers.
detailedSteps.zh: 将移液管小心插入 Ficoll 界面上方，吸取白膜层（2–4 mL）至干净离心管。避免扰动下层。

detailedSteps.en: **Washing**
Wash 1: Add 40 mL RT DPBS to collected PBMCs. Centrifuge at 300×g for 10 min with brake ON. Decant supernatant. If pellet is red, add 2 mL ACK lysis buffer for 5 min at RT.
detailedSteps.zh: 第一次洗涤：向收集的 PBMC 中加入 40 mL 室温 DPBS。300×g 离心 10 分钟（开刹车）。倒掉上清。若沉淀偏红，加 2 mL ACK 裂解液室温处理 5 分钟。

detailedSteps.en: Wash 2: Resuspend in 10 mL DPBS. Centrifuge at 200×g for 10 min at RT to remove platelets. Decant supernatant.
detailedSteps.zh: 第二次洗涤：重悬于 10 mL DPBS。200×g 离心 10 分钟去除血小板。倒掉上清。

detailedSteps.en: **Cell Counting & Downstream**
detailedSteps.zh: **细胞计数与下游处理**

detailedSteps.en: Resuspend PBMCs in complete RPMI or DPBS. Count cells with trypan blue exclusion. Typical yield: 1–2×10⁶ PBMCs per mL whole blood; viability should be >90%.
detailedSteps.zh: 用完全 RPMI 或 DPBS 重悬 PBMC。台盼蓝排除法计数。典型产量：每毫升全血 1–2×10⁶ PBMC；活率应 >90%。
